name_en: Original leather [New] GG Marmont quilted mini bag. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability design, neutral light beige quilted V-shaped leather material, a slightly structured body, a flap closure, and double G accessories. This bag features a versatile carrying design, easily switching between a shoulder bag and a handbag by sliding the metal chain. Light beige quilted V-shaped leather, antique gold-tone hardware, suede microfiber lining, double G, sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm high) or top handle (30cm high). Also usable as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.

This bag features a versatile carrying design, easily switching between a shoulder bag and a handbag by sliding the metal chain. Light beige quilted V-shaped leather, antique gold-tone hardware, suede microfiber lining, double G, sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm high) or top handle (30cm high). Also usable as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
Model: 443497.
Dimensions: 26(W) x 13(H) x 6cm(D)
Color: Light Pink/Original leather.
Model height: 177cm
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, small wallet, and lipstick
